description: Sample golden set over a tiny fake company handbook. Replace with 10+ real cases from your own domain.

cases.question: How many vacation days do employees get per year?
cases.expected: 20 days of paid vacation per year.

cases.question: How many unused vacation days can roll over to next year?
What are the core collaboration hours?
Within how many days must expense reports be submitted?
What percentage of the health insurance premium does the company cover for employees?
How long is the probation period and what notice applies?
cases.expected: 90 days, during which either party may end employment with two weeks notice.
